new-website-2025.title: Welcome to the New Slade Brewing Website
new-website-2025.summary: We're thrilled to unveil our brand new website! This redesign showcases our beautiful beer selection and makes it easier for you to learn about what we're brewing.
new-website-2025.content: We're thrilled to unveil our brand new website! This redesign showcases our beautiful beer selection and makes it easier for you to learn about what we're brewing. Check out our beer selection above to see what we have available. Each beer comes with details on its style, ABV, and IBU, plus links to view them on Untappd.

winter-brewing-2025.title: Winter Brewing Season
winter-brewing-2025.summary: The winter months are here, and we're taking full advantage with some exciting seasonal brews in development.
winter-brewing-2025.content: The winter months are here, and we're taking full advantage with some exciting seasonal brews in development. Check back soon for announcements!
